# Jumpspace Docs For Agents

Jumpspace is repo-local implementation memory for AI coding agents.

Use these docs when working in a repo that has Jumpspace installed:

- New to the repo: /start-here/quickstart/
- Need the product thesis: /start-here/why-jumpspace/
- Bootstrapping existing docs: /workflows/bootstrap-existing-docs/
- Demo flow: /workflows/canonical-demo/
- Asking evidence questions: /workflows/ask-questions-with-evidence/
- Starting implementation work: /workflows/start-agent-work/
- Verifying work: /workflows/verify-work/
- Reviewing PR drift: /workflows/review-pr-drift/
- Handing off to another agent: /workflows/handoff-between-agents/
- Installing agent guidance: /agent-skills/overview/
- Jumpspace Cloud design partners: /jumpspace-cloud/
- Command reference: /reference/cli/
- JSON schemas and SDKs: /reference/json-schemas/ and /reference/sdks/
- Future improvements: /contribute/future-improvements/

Trust rule: treat `jumpspace ask` as an evidence summary, not an authoritative
answer. Inspect linked docs, code, and tests before editing.
